name: choose-your-authentication
description: Learn authentication by building — one method at a time

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @cyoa/api" "npm run dev -w @cyoa/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cyoa/api && npm run build -w @cyoa/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cyoa/api && npm run typecheck -w @cyoa/web
